name: Oliver's Cornmeal Tea Biscuits
recipeInstructions: Blend the dry ingredients in a large bowl. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture is the texture of coarse meal. Blend eggs, milk, and water. Stir into the dry ingredients and combine until moistened and a soft dough forms. Turn the dough out on a heavily floured surface. Pat or roll to a 1-inch thickness. Cut into 3 1/2 to 4-inch rounds. Transfer to lightly greased baking sheets and bake in a 375°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes, or until done. Makes 2 dozen biscuits.
